top_signals.title: Ukraine-Russia drone war turns UGVs into medevac lifeline
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Iranian Oil Tankers Resume Shipments After US-Iran Deal
top_signals.summary: At least three tankers carrying Iranian oil have sailed through the U.S. naval blockade this week, with a fourth, an empty vessel, heading towards the Gulf of Oman, after the U.S. and Iran agreed a framework deal to reopen the strategic Strait of Hormuz…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Announcement of the publication of the Governor's interview transcript
top_signals.summary: Statement from the Bank of England
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Trace Finance raises $32M for cross-border stablecoin settlement expansion
top_signals.summary: The raise comes as stablecoin regulation advances globally and financial firms invest in infrastructure connecting blockchain payments with traditional banking systems.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Lazard Undercuts Rival Centerview in Battle for Venezuela Deal
top_signals.summary: Investment bank Lazard Inc. is making a late bid to dislodge rival Centerview Partners as Venezuela’s financial adviser, offering to oversee one of the largest-ever sovereign debt restructurings for a sharply lower fee.

top_signals.title: Matalan kicks off turnaround under new boss as retailer slashes jobs
top_signals.summary: Matalan’s new boss has kicked off the fast fashion retailer’s wide-range turnaround which has revamped dozens of stores but caused the loss of more than 600 jobs. Henrik Nordvall, who took the reins as chief executive in November, said he is “encouraged by the progress already underway” as the clothes seller pushes to renew its [...]
